mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_history (user_id, work_id, is_delete, time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{workId}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT w.work_id, w.user_id AS work_user_id, w.work_title, w.img_url, w.series_id, w.like_count, w.star_count, w.view_count, w.is_original_work, w.out_url, h.user_id, h.time FROM tb_history h JOIN tb_works w ON h.work_id = w.work_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.is_delete = 0 AND w.is_delete = 0 AND h.time = (SELECT MAX(h2.time) FROM tb_history h2 WHERE h2.user_id = #{userId} AND h2.work_id = h.work_id AND h2.is_delete = 0) ORDER BY h.time DESC
